platformer-0.3.0.description:
## Improvements
* Only set the first instance of a recipe as progressive by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/29
* Add progressive pipe by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/34
* Switch to a prefix for recipe item names by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/32
* Improve advanced oil processing logic by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/36

## Fixes
* Fix minimum craftsanity adjustment by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/33
* Add missing recipe for automation by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/35
* Fix receiving progressive items by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/37

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/compare/platformer-0.2.1...platformer-0.3.0
platformer-0.3.0.title: Factorio: Platformer v0.3.0
